campaigns.name: Payouts King Ransomware Campaign
campaigns.description: Ransomware variant using direct system calls to evade EDR products. Bypasses user-mode API hooking. Active threat.

campaigns.name: TA4922 Multi-RAT Distribution
campaigns.description: TA4922 deploying Atlas RAT, RomulusLoader, SilentRunLoader, ValleyRAT simultaneously. High-confidence Proofpoint attribution.

campaigns.name: IronWorm npm Supply Chain Attack
campaigns.description: 36 npm packages compromised in supply chain attack. Affects Node.js developer environments and CI/CD pipelines.

campaigns.name: APT-22 ICS Infrastructure Campaign
campaigns.description: Coordinated targeting of industrial control systems across Hitachi Energy (RTU500, ITT600, MACH HiDraw) and maritime navigation (NAVTOR NavBox). CISA-confirmed.

campaigns.name: Teams/Google Drive 20-Minute Compromise
campaigns.description: Threat actor leveraging Microsoft Teams and Google Drive for initial access, achieving full compromise within 20 minutes of initial contact. Bypasses email security gateways.
campaigns.action_required: Review Teams external access policies immediately
